nodes.context: Italian-American Mafia crime family based in Dallas, Texas, active from c. 1910 to 1990.
Major American Mafia organization based in Chicago, allied with the Dallas crime family.
One of the Five Families of New York, allied with the Dallas crime family.
Mafia family based in Kansas City, allied with the Dallas crime family.
Mafia family based in New Orleans, allied with the Dallas crime family and had close ties through Joseph Campisi.
Mafia family based in Tampa, Florida, allied with the Dallas crime family and attempted to strengthen ties via Vincent LoScalzo.

edges.context: The Dallas crime family was allied with the Chicago Outfit.
The Dallas crime family was allied with the Genovese crime family.
The Dallas crime family was allied with the Kansas City crime family.
The Dallas crime family was allied with the New Orleans crime family, with close ties through Joseph Campisi.
The Dallas crime family was allied with the Trafficante crime family, and Vincent LoScalzo attempted to strengthen ties.
